sentences.text: Thank you for calling town. One. If you know your party's extension you can dial it at any time or press pound for the company directory. If you would like to make the leasing our property inquiries press one. If you are an existing tenant please press two to leave a general voice message press three or remain on the line. Please hold while your call is being transferred to extension number. Two zero zero two. How can I help you?
Just was calling for Brian our ski.

And your name. Just a moment. Your call is being processed by my tail voicemail you've reach Brian your bank. I'm unable to answer the phone right now. Please leave a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you. After the tone please record your message. When finished you may hang up to deliver the message or press.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Bryan Eubank @ Town West Realty
